name: pcs-promo-creation
description: Guided end-to-end PCS promo pipeline: parse a vendor deck -> build NetSuite kit imports -> create Jira promotion tasks, with a Yes/No confirmation before each stage and the existing hard PROM write-protection at the Jira step. Orchestrates pcs-promo-parser and pcs-jira-task-builder and drives the Kit Builder `kb` CLI (>= 0.5.18); Claude writes each kit's Page Title and Detailed Description from the item data using the ported title/description rules. Prompts for file uploads (deck PDF, pricing cheat sheet, NetSuite Promo Kit Support export) when needed.
